steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "3818"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Avery" in the employee list
And I should see Employee "Avery" with "Turn: 0.0" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "FULL SET & FILL IN" category
Expect "toHaveText" locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
When I select the "FULL SET & FILL IN" category
Expect "toHaveText" locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
Click locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
And I add the "Fill gel" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I click on the total price of "Fill gel"
Click locator('.xTicketItems__info').filter({ has: locator('.itemName').filter({ hasText: 'Fill gel' }) }).locator('.xTicketItems__total')
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the employee "Avery" in the employee list
And I should see Employee "Avery" with "Turn: 1.0" in the employee list
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I reopen ticket with payment amount "$23.58"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "Avery" in the ticket
When I click on the item "Technician" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "TECHNICIAN MULTIPLE"
When I select the "Fill gel" service in the dialog
And I select the "Zoey" employee in the dialog
And I click on the "Apply" button in the dialog
Then I should see the "Zoey" employee in my cart
When I click on the "PAY" button
And I click on the "CLOSE TICKET" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
And I should see Employee "Avery" with "Turn: 0.0" in the employee list
And I should see Employee "Zoey" with "Turn: 1.0" in the employee list
When I navigate to "Turn" on the navigation bar
Then I should be redirected to TURN_DETAILS page
And I should see the text "Technicians" visible
And I should see the text "All" visible
And I should see the Round 1 for "Zoey"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('td').filter({ has: getByTitle('Zoey') }).locator('.MuiChip-root').filter({ hasText: 'Round' }).locator('.MuiChip-label').filter({ hasText: '1' })
And I should see the Turn 1.00 for "Zoey"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('td').filter({ has: getByTitle('Zoey') }).locator('.MuiChip-root').filter({ hasText: 'Turn' }).locator('.MuiChip-label').filter({ hasText: '1.00' })
And I should see the Auto Turn 1.00 for "Zoey"
And I should see the Round 0 for "Avery"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('td').filter({ has: getByTitle('Avery') }).locator('.MuiChip-root').filter({ hasText: 'Round' }).locator('.MuiChip-label').filter({ hasText: '0' })
And I should see the Turn 0.00 for "Avery"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('td').filter({ has: getByTitle('Avery') }).locator('.MuiChip-root').filter({ hasText: 'Turn' }).locator('.MuiChip-label').filter({ hasText: '0.00' })
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$23.58"
When I reopen to void ticket with payment amount "$23.58"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$23.58' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('System Test', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
And I should not see the employee "Zoey" in the ticket list
